holdings.n: BLK CSH FND TREASURY SL AGENCY

holdings.infoBox: CRBN is an equity ETF with a total of 1120 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 4.62%, Apple at 4.29%, Microsoft at 2.63%, Amazon.com at 2.28%, and Alphabet at 2.22%.

overview.description: The iShares Low Carbon Optimized MSCI ACWI ETF (CRBN) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI ACWI Low Carbon Target index. The fund tracks an index of stocks from global firms selected for a bias toward lower carbon emissions. CRBN was launched on Dec 9, 2014 and is issued by BlackRock.
